creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->repocopy

I hate to ask: 
Despite me telling the maintainer to open up 4 prs (one for each repocopy), he only opened up one. 
Do you want me to tell him to open three more? or can you repocopy these: 

net-mgmt/zabbix-agent -> zabbix2-agent 
net-mgmt/zabbit-frontend -> zabbix2-frontend 
net-mgmt/zabbix-proxy -> zabbix2-proxy
